title: EmAlter's Trains
description: Design, build, and automate your dream railway network centered around Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
# The Modpack
All Aboard! This modpack is designed for players who love logistics and architecture. At its core lies the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u) mod, offering realistic automated trains and scheduling systems.

We have paired MTR with a curated selection of decoration mods to help you build immersive stations, bustling terminals, and detailed cityscapes around your railway network. Whether you are a fan of engineering or interior design, this pack provides the tools to create a living, breathing transit system.

# Better in Creative Mode!
This modpack is best enjoyed in creative multiplayer with friends, for this reason we have included powerful building tools like [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom) and [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) (with [WorldEdit CUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/worldedit-cui)) to help you construct the perfect stations and cities with ease!

# Contents

## Railway & Transit Systems
*The core of the experience: build, manage, and automate.*

- [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u) - The heart of the pack: create fully functional automated railways, stations, and depots.
- [Joban Client Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jcm) - Enhances the experience with essential station utilities and visual improvements.
- [MTR London Underground Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-tube) - Specialized tools and blocks for constructing authentic underground networks.
- [Station Decoration](https://modrinth.com/mod/station-decoration) - Adds more blocks to bring your platforms to life.
- [Tianjin Metro](https://modrinth.com/mod/tianjin-metro) - Enhances the experience with essential station utilities and visual improvements.

## Architecture & Aesthetics
*Everything you need to design immersive cities and stations.*

- [Banner Flags](https://modrinth.com/datapack/banner-flags) - Allows for horizontal banner placement for better signage.
- [Beautify: Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated) - Vanilla-styled decorations to add warmth to interiors.
- [Display Case](https://modrinth.com/mod/displaycase) - Showcase items inside glass cases.
- [Enchanted Vertical Slabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanted-vertical-slabs) - Adds vertical slabs for finer building control.
- [Fantasy Armor (Medieval Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fantasy_armor) - Adds new cosmetic armor sets.
- [Fantasy Weapons (Medieval Series)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fantasy_weapons) - Adds a variety of new cosmetic weapons.
- [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted) - A massive collection of furniture and interior items.
- [New Slab Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-slab-variants) - Expands the slab options to include nearly every block material.
- [Paladin's Furniture Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-furniture) - High-quality furniture for modern interiors.
- [Signed Paintings](https://modrinth.com/mod/signed-paintings) - Display custom images in-game using URLs.
- [Terraqueous](https://modrinth.com/mod/terraqueous) - Adds lush vegetation, fruits, and flowers to landscaping.
- [TrafficCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/trafficcraft) - Essential road signs and asphalt decorations for city streets.
- [Weaponworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/weaponworks) - Expands the arsenal with vanilla-friendly weapon designs.
- [Yuushya Townscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/yuushya-townscape) - Comprehensive urban building blocks and decorations.

## Optimization & Performance
*Keeping your trains running smoothly with high FPS.*

- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Increase performance of block entity rendering
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Skips rendering hidden entities to boost frame rates.
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Significantly reduces memory usage.
- [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Optimizes immediate mode rendering for better efficiency.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - General-purpose game logic optimization.
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - Patches known memory leaks to prevent crashes over time.
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - An all-in-one performance booster and bug fixer.
- [Skip Transitions](https://modrinth.com/mod/skip-transitions) - Remove intrusive or distracting transition effects
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Powerful rendering engine replacement for high FPS.
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Unlocks additional video settings for Sodium.
- [Starlight (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) - Rewrites the lighting engine for instant updates.
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak) - Improves CPU thread scheduling.

## Quality of Life & Utilities
*Enhancements for gameplay, interface, and mechanics.*

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Displays the player's skin layer in 3D
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - Displays the player's head next to their chat messages (Client).
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Enables connected textures for glass and other blocks.
- [Creative Fly](https://modrinth.com/mod/creative-fly) - Provides better control and speed while flying in creative mode.
- [Diagonal Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-fences) - Connects fences diagonally.
- [Diagonal Walls](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-walls) - Connects walls diagonally.
- [Diagonal Windows](https://modrinth.com/mod/diagonal-windows) - Connects glass panes diagonally.
- [Easy NPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc) - Easily create and customize NPCs for your world.
- [Emojiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/emojiful) - Adds emoji support to the in-game chat.
- [Energized Power](https://modrinth.com/mod/energized-power) - Adds basic energy mechanics and tech items.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Visual interface to view and configure installed mods.
- [Server Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-chat-heads) - Displays player heads in chat (Server).
- [VinURL](https://modrinth.com/mod/vinurl) - Play custom music from the web via music discs.
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Detailed minimap with waypoint support.
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Full-screen world map integration.
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - Adds a configurable zoom key.

## Core Libraries & APIs
*Essential frameworks required for the mods above to function.*

- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Filters API](https://modrinth.com/mod/filters-api)
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port)
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
- [ItemFig](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemfig)
- [MonoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/monolib)
- [owo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
- [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)
- [Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib)
- [ShetiPhianCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/shetiphiancore)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

## Resource Packs
*Don't forget to enable the resourcepacks in the settings*
- [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass)
- [World PIDS - Pack [MTR4/JCM]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/world-pids-pack)
- [[MTR] 300 Series Shinkansen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-300-series-shinkansen)
- [[MTR] 700 Series Shinkansen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr4-700-series-shinkansen)
- [[MTR] DOCTOR YELLOW | Class 923 Shinkansen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-doctor-yellow)
- [[MTR] Shinkansen Infrastructure](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr-shinkansen-infrastructure)
- [[MTR/NTE] World Tram pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/worldtrampack)
